2606.26563.title: scBench-Long: Verifiable Benchmarking of Long-Horizon Single-Cell Biology
2606.26563.paper_summary: Single-cell studies require analysts to convert raw measurements into specific biological claims through multi-step workflows and integration of metadata, assay context, and auxiliary evidence. Existing AI-biology benchmarks largely measure broad knowledge, executable workflows, or local analysis steps. We introduce scBench-Long, a benchmark for long-horizon single-cell biology in which agents must recover scientific conclusions from raw or near-raw data without prescribed methods. The benchmark contains 21 evaluations spanning melanoma CD8 T-cell reactivity, CD8 RNA+ATAC regulatory inference, human--monkey chimera development, KRAS-driven lung tumor aging, and lethal COVID-19 lung pathology. Tasks cover paired scRNA/TCR sequencing, RNA and chromatin profiling, cross-species transcriptomics, combinatorial scRNA-seq, single-nucleus RNA-seq, immune repertoires, ortholog maps, ligand--receptor resources, and validation evidence. Candidate claims are reproduced, reviewed, and converted into controlled answer vocabularies with deterministic grading and trajectory rubrics. Across 1,068 completed trajectories, the strongest model--harness pair passes 16/63 runs (25.4\%). scBench-Long evaluates whether agents can move beyond local analysis steps and make complex scientific claims that are supported by single-cell data.
2606.26563.paper_summary_zh: 單細胞研究要求分析師透過多步驟的工作流程以及整合元數據、檢測背景和輔助證據，將原始測量轉換為具體的生物學主張。現有的AI生物學基準主要測量廣泛的知識、可執行的工作流程或局部分析步驟。我們介紹了scBench-Long，這是一個針對長期單細胞生物學的基準，其中代理必須從原始或接近原始的數據中恢復科學結論，而不依賴於預設的方法。該基準包含21個評估，涵蓋黑色素瘤CD8 T細胞反應性、CD8 RNA+ATAC調控推斷、人類-猴子嵌合體發展、KRAS驅動的肺腫瘤老化，以及致命的COVID-19肺病理。任務包括配對的scRNA/TCR測序、RNA和染色質分析、跨物種轉錄組學、組合scRNA-seq、單核RNA-seq、免疫庫、同源圖、配體-受體資源和驗證證據。候選主張被重現、審查，並轉換為受控的答案詞彙，並具有確定性的評分和軌跡標準。在1,068個完成的軌跡中，最強的模型-工具組合通過了16/63次運行（25.4%）。scBench-Long評估代理是否能超越局部分析步驟，並提出由單細胞數據支持的複雜科學主張。
2606.26563.author: Ian Diks et.al.
2606.26563.authors: Ian Diks, Zhen Yang, Arjun Banerjee, Tim Proctor, Kenny Workman
